title: rubus ellipticus var. ellipticus
intro: Rubus ellipticus var. ellipticus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or East Indian raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and other health problems. The health benefits of Rubus ellipticus var. ellipticus include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve cardiovascular health, and lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make capsules, tinctures, or topical creams for various health benefits.
